description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a rounded fuselage and a smooth, streamlined body painted primarily in white with blue accents on the wingtips, tail, and engine nacelles. The wings are mounted low on the fuselage and feature slight upward angles at the tips, while the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, with a black-tinted window area suggesting an enclosed, forward-mounted cockpit. Two cylindrical engines are mounted under the wings, each with blue and yellow banding. The landing gear is visible beneath the fuselage, indicating a tricycle configuration with two main wheels and a nose wheel. The overall design is simple and cartoon-like, with minimal surface detailing and a glossy finish.
description: A small, stylized white airplane with blue accents, low-mounted wings, twin underwing engines, and a rounded fuselage. Features a forward cockpit and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded fuselage, low-mounted wing with blue tip, underwing engine, and tail with blue accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the nose, cockpit window, both underwing engines, and the symmetrical wing and tail configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other wing and engine, with clear visibility of the tail's blue accents and cockpit window.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail assembly, both wings with blue tips, and the overall width of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: low-wing configuration with straight wings and slight upward-angled wingtips; no visible winglets or variable geometry.
attribute_tail_design: conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, fixed
attribute_cockpit_placement: forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single large window area
